en: Avetta PQF - Bureau of Safety and Environmental Enforcement (BSEE)
Does your company perform offshore operations or work in the outer continental shelf (OCS) of the United States under BSEE jurisdiction?
Does your company provide SEMS training for employees working offshore or in the OCS?
Is training documentation kept in case of requisition by a BSEE official?
Does your company perform well-control and production safety services?

Does your company conduct weekly well-control drills with each drilling crew and familiarize the crew with their roles and functions so that all crew members can perform their duties promptly and efficiently?
Are your company's production safety systems tested and documented in accordance with API RP14C?
Does your company use measurement while drilling (MWD) tools to monitor kicks?
Does your company maintain records and documentation that meets BSEE requirements in 30 CFR 250.462?
Does your company utilize killsheets and have shut-in procedures in place for situations where a kick warning sign is observed?
Are your company's employees trained in the implementation of shut-in procedures?
